title: docker-compose network cannot access the host
body:
### Issue Description

```
% podman run --rm -it nginx:latest curl http://host.containers.internal:11434
Ollama is running

% podman run --rm -it nginx:latest cat /etc/hosts
127.0.0.1       localhost localhost.localdomain localhost4 localhost4.localdomain4
::1     localhost localhost.localdomain localhost6 localhost6.localdomain6
100.71.244.141  host.containers.internal host.docker.internal
192.168.50.51   58f4f7e17f97 jolly_benz
```

vs

```
version: '3'
services:
  nginx:
    image: nginx:latest
    restart: always
    volumes:
      - ./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:Z
    ports:
      - "8081:80"
 
% doco run nginx curl http://host.docker.internal:11434
Creating docker_nginx_run ... done
Emulate Docker CLI using podman. Create /etc/containers/nodocker to quiet msg.
WARN[0000] Requested oom_score_adj=0 is lower than the current one, changing to 100
curl: (7) Failed to connect to host.docker.internal port 11434 after 0 ms: Couldn't connect to server
ERROR: 7

% doco run nginx cat /etc/hosts
Creating docker_nginx_run ... done
Emulate Docker CLI using podman. Create /etc/containers/nodocker to quiet msg.
WARN[0000] Requested oom_score_adj=0 is lower than the current one, changing to 100
127.0.0.1       localhost
::1     localhost
192.168.50.51   host.containers.internal host.docker.internal
10.89.0.4       a757ed45ed3e docker_nginx_run_f525355d712c
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. run a container with podman and try to access host.containers.internal
2. it works
3. do the same using docker-compose
4. it fails


### Describe the results you received

When using Podman compatibility to run docker-compose files, it creates an isolated network unable to access the host

### Describe the results you expected

To be able to access the host

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting
